title: 'Mummy kasam, ek hi cap hai': KKR star's epic response to fan demand - WATCH
content: Young KKR batter Angkrish Raghuvanshi humorously declined a fan's request for his cap, stating he only receives one. Despite this lighthearted moment, Raghuvanshi has been a standout performer for KKR this season, leading their run charts. However, the team has faced a difficult start to IPL 2026, struggling to secure wins.

title: TCS CEO on IT dying by 2030: Companies will need more services for AI
content: TCS CEO K Krithivasan dismisses predictions of India's IT sector becoming obsolete by 2030, asserting that AI will amplify the need for IT services. He highlights the industry's resilience due to deep skill sets, not just cost.

title: AFI to take disciplinary action if athletes flout sponsorship rule
content: The Athletics Federation of India (AFI) has made it mandatory for athletes to seek prior approval before signing endorsement deals, citing a need to protect them from unfair contracts. While officials argue the move safeguards uneducated athletes from exploitation, sports lawyers contend federations have no legal standing to govern personal contracts, raising concerns over enforceability and confidentiality.

title: Noida workers protest: Key issues, wages, and other demands; top 10 things to know
content: Factory workers' demands for a wage hike escalated into violent clashes, exposing deep-rooted anger over pay disparities and poor working conditions. The strike paralyzed traffic, stranding thousands and causing significant damage to public and private property. Security forces were deployed to restore normalcy.

title: 'There are two options': Hardik Pandya delivers brutal reality check after MI defeat
content: Mumbai Indians faced a third straight loss in IPL 2026. Captain Hardik Pandya addressed the team, emphasizing collective learning over isolation.  The team conceded too many runs, struggling to control matches.  Pandya indicated a need for rethinking strategies and potential tactical shifts.  Mumbai aims to halt its slide in the tournament.

title: FBI takes down website that stole millions from internet users across the world
content: A sophisticated global phishing operation, centered around the "W3LL phishing kit," has been dismantled by the FBI and Indonesian authorities. This "full-service" platform enabled cybercriminals to steal thousands of account credentials and attempt over $20 million in fraud. The alleged developer was detained in Indonesia, marking a significant blow to cybercrime.

title: Out of missiles: US allies in Gulf turn to Asia for more ammo
content: Gulf nations, facing depleted air defence stockpiles due to sustained air bombardment, are urgently seeking alternative weapons suppliers beyond the US. Saudi Arabia, UAE, and Qatar are exploring options from South Korea, Ukraine, and Britain, driven by Iranian retaliatory attacks and US delivery delays. This diversification highlights global arms production strains and a shifting defence landscape.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' day 26: Ranveer Singh film chases Rs 1100 crore milestone on 4th Monday
content: Aditya Dhar’s espionage masterpiece, 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge', continues its record-shattering journey at the box office. On day 26 (fourth Monday), the Ranveer Singh-starrer has officially amassed over Rs 1,084 crore India net, solidifying its status as the highest-grossing Hindi film in history. Despite the intense IPL 2026 season, the film's strategic family-friendly edits and viral momentum have pushed its worldwide gross past the Rs 1,712 crore mark. Check out the detailed live tracking and daily collection breakdown here.

title: Google CEO Sundar Pichai has a message for all American technology companies
content: Google CEO Sundar Pichai urged US tech companies to lead global AI development, emphasizing its profound impact and the need for responsible innovation to benefit all Americans. He highlighted AI's transformative applications in medicine, education, and emergency response, while also acknowledging challenges like workforce disruption and the need for retraining and regulation.

title: Footballer dies after robbers attack team bus
content: Ghanaian footballer Dominic Frimpong has died after armed robbers attacked his Berekum Chelsea FC team bus returning from an away match. Masked gunmen fired at the bus in Ashanti Region, forcing players to flee. Frimpong was shot, later dying in hospital. The Ghana FA called it a tragic loss, mourning the 20-year-old rising star.

title: Who to be next Bihar CM? BJP likely to declare face for top post on Tuesday
content: The leadership change will mark a milestone for the BJP, which is set to get its first chief minister in Bihar, the only Hindi heartland state where the top post has so far eluded the party. Even so, party leaders have remained cautious in their public remarks. Dilip Jaiswal, a minister and former Bihar BJP president, said, "It is an emotional moment for us. We hope that Nitish Kumar will continue to offer his guidance to the new government."

title: How are 890 schools still running without girls’ toilets in Maharashtra?
content: While Maharashtra embraces AI-powered classrooms, a stark reality persists: 890 schools lack separate girls' toilets. This highlights a critical infrastructure gap, with a growing focus on essential facilities like functional toilets, safety, electricity, and campus maintenance to bridge the divide between modern learning and basic needs.

title: 'Don't fear him': Pope Leo takes on Trump, says won't back down on war criticism
content: Pope Leo has responded to US President Donald Trump's criticism. The Pope stated he will continue speaking out against war, including the conflict involving Iran. He defended the Vatican's appeals for peace as rooted in Christian teaching. Trump had called the Pope weak on crime and terrible for foreign policy..

title: 'Will respond to bombs with ballots': Amit Shah in Bengal, warns 'jail' for TMC 'goons'
content: Union Home Minister Amit Shah intensified his attack on the TMC in West Bengal, urging voters to respond to violence with ballots and promising to bring the BJP to power. He alleged corruption and a "mafia raj," vowing strict action against "syndicate and cut-money promoters" and illegal immigrants, while also highlighting welfare promises.

title: F1 returning to Greater Noida? Sports minister says 3 companies interested; what we know
content: Sports Minister Mansukh Mandaviya announced efforts to bring Formula 1 back to India in 2027, aiming to resolve tax hurdles that caused its departure in 2013. While the minister expressed confidence, Formula 1 sources indicated an agreement is still distant, though India remains a market of interest.

title: 'Himanta most corrupt in country': Rahul backs Khera as passport row escalates
content: Khera struck Himanta's nerve  after he alleged, in a press conference, the Assam CM's wife held multiple foreign passports, prompting a sharp rebuttal and legal threat from the BJP leader. “We have documents showing that Assam chief minister Himanta Biswa Sarma’s wife Riniki Bhuyan Sharma, holds three passports. The first is a UAE Golden Card, the second an Antigua and Barbuda passport, and the third an Egyptian passport. Two of these belong to Islamic countries, yet they continue to claim religious adherence publicly,” Khera alleged.

title: Delhi woman held for forcing UP cop to convert, marry under ‘rape case’ threat
content: A woman has been arrested in Baghpat for allegedly coercing a police constable into religious conversion and marriage. The constable claims the accused pressured him to change his religion and marry her, threatening to frame him in a rape case if he refused. She is also accused of blackmail and forcing him into religious activities.

title: Pakistan PM Shehbaz Sharif to visit Saudi Arabia after US-Iran talks fail
content: Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif will visit Saudi Arabia following an invitation from Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman. The trip occurs amidst a fragile ceasefire and follows talks that concluded without a formal agreement. Sharif's delegation will discuss regional developments and financial cooperation, with Pakistan also deploying military forces to Saudi Arabia under a defense pact.

title: ‘I’ll always be grateful’: Brett Lee’s emotional tribute to Asha Bhosle
content: Former Australian cricketer Brett Lee fondly remembers his unique musical collaboration with the late Asha Bhosle, who passed away at 92. Their 2007 hit 'You’re the One for Me' blended cricket and music, showcasing Bhosle's immense talent and remarkable humility. Lee cherishes their bond, highlighting her warmth and generosity, and believes her legacy will endure.

title: Salman Zaman: ‘Asha Bhosle introduced Bollywood to true versatility’ - Exclusive
content: Legendary singer Asha Bhosle has passed away at the age of 92, leaving behind an unparalleled musical legacy. Qawali singer Salman Zaman lauded her for introducing true versatility to Bollywood, effortlessly transitioning between genres. Her demise on April 12, 2026, after a brief illness, was confirmed by her son, with state honors planned for her funeral in Mumbai.

title: Will Sensex hit 95k by Dec? Reasons why Morgan Stanley sees a bull run in stock market
content: Morgan Stanley believes the Sensex has the potential to reach 95,000 by December 2026, with its strategist Ridham Desai indicating that Indian equities may be entering a fresh bull phase after enduring one of their weakest periods of relative performance in decades

title: Days after major security breach, Delhi Assembly receives bomb threat
content: The Delhi Legislative Assembly experienced a bomb threat via email, triggering a multi-agency response including police, bomb disposal units, and dog squads. A thorough search yielded no suspicious findings, and the situation is under control. This incident follows a recent security breach where an SUV rammed the assembly gate, leading to the detention of three suspects.

title: Supreme Court flags ‘margin of error’ in Bengal SIR, refuses to intervene
content: The Supreme Court expressed serious concerns regarding West Bengal's electoral roll revision, emphasizing the need for a strong appeals system to correct wrongful deletions.  Judicial officers are overwhelmed, leading to potential errors.  Despite these worries, the court directed voters to appellate tribunals for resolution, highlighting the importance of voter inclusion.

title: 'Mood favouring the BJP': PM Modi after interacting with party workers in Bengal
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi expressed confidence in the BJP's growing support in West Bengal, citing feedback from party workers in Siliguri. He highlighted public connection with the BJP's development agenda and criticized the TMC government for corruption, appeasement, and neglecting North Bengal.

title: IPL 2026: Sanju Samson’s no-panic mode takes CSK back to MS Dhoni days
content: Sanju Samson's explosive 115 against Delhi Capitals has revitalised Chennai Super Kings' campaign, ending a six-match home losing streak.  The Kerala batter's composed, timing-focused innings silenced early season doubts.  CSK bowling coach Eric Simons lauded Samson's calmness, placing him near MS Dhoni's level.  Samson's self-belief, honed by past setbacks, proved crucial in repaying the franchise's faith.

title: Brigadier, his son assaulted by men in south Delhi for objecting to drinking near their home
content: A senior Indian Army brigadier and his son faced an alleged assault in Vasant Enclave, Delhi, after reportedly confronting two men drinking in a car near their home. The incident, occurring late Friday night, has prompted a swift response from the Indian Army, with a Military Police team assisting the ongoing Delhi Police investigation.

title: ‘Just go off the field’: Sunil Gavaskar loses cool over RCB in heated MI clash
content: Former India captain Sunil Gavaskar voiced his displeasure during a Royal Challengers Bengaluru match. He felt the team excessively used medical time-outs, slowing down play. Gavaskar suggested players should receive treatment off the field. This incident occurred during Mumbai Indians' chase at the Wankhede Stadium. Royal Challengers Bengaluru ultimately won the match by 18 runs.

title: Jana Nayagan leak: R Madhavan calls HD piracy heartbreaking; makers plan lega
content: Vijay Thalapathy's upcoming film, 'Jana Nayagan,' faces a setback with HD clips leaking online. Stars like R Madhavan and Suriya have voiced strong condemnation, calling the piracy 'heartbreaking' and urging fans to respect the filmmakers' hard work. Producers KVN Productions LLP are pursuing legal action against the unauthorized circulation.

title: Oil shortage, price spike & more: How Hormuz blockade is hitting India and global markets
content: Global markets are in turmoil following President Trump's announcement of a naval blockade in the Strait of Hormuz. This move has sent crude oil prices soaring and threatens to isolate Iran, potentially triggering further escalation. India faces significant economic challenges, including a ballooning energy import bill and disruptions to its exports and workforce remittances.

title: 7-year delay, no evidence, only allegations: Why SC quashed 498A case against in-laws
content: The Court found that the allegations of dowry demand and cruelty were not supported by any material evidence. The Court pointed out that there is no use of criminal law in situations where unfounded accusations are raised, especially in family conflicts where one would wish to implicate more than two family members.

title: Highest in almost 3 years! India buying ‘all Russian crude it can get its hands on’
content: Indian refiners have ramped up purchases of Russian crude over the past two months and expect procurement to remain high through the rest of the year amid easing concerns around potential Donald Trump administration sanctions.

title: Yuzvendra Chahal in spotlight again as actress Taniya Chatterjee reveals shocking DM
content: Actress Taniya Chatterjee has claimed Indian cricketer Yuzvendra Chahal sent her a direct message on Instagram, calling her 'cute.' She reportedly showed the alleged messages to paparazzi. This revelation comes amidst ongoing public interest in Chahal's personal life following his 2025 divorce. Chahal, who last played for India in 2023, remains a prominent IPL performer for Punjab Kings.

title: ‘Needs to be examined’: SC seeks Centre, ECI response on biometric voting plea
content: The Supreme Court is reviewing a proposal to implement fingerprint and iris scans at polling stations to combat voter fraud and impersonation. Notices have been issued to the central government, Election Commission, and states. While acknowledging the need to examine this for future elections, the court clarified it won't be introduced for current state polls.

title: 'I don't make it easy': How Rory McIlroy won back-to-back Masters
content: After seeing a six-shot lead erased on Saturday, McIlroy still found a way to secure his second green jacket.﻿

title: Sources: Rivers out after 3 seasons with Bucks
content: Doc Rivers is departing as the head coach of the Bucks, but the franchise and Rivers are discussing whether he will move to an advisory role in the organization, sources said.

title: Rory prevails, becomes 4th to repeat at Masters
content: The green jacket is Rory McIlroy's again. He won the Masters on Sunday by one shot, becoming the first back-to-back winner since Tiger Woods in 2001-02.

title: Flagg's rookie season ends with sprained ankle
content: Cooper Flagg, the No. 1 pick and Rookie of the Year favorite, sustained the injury early in the second quarter of the Mavericks' regular-season finale.

title: Giannis vents about Bucks, won't rule out return
content: Giannis Antetokounmpo gave contradicting messages about his future after a disappointing Bucks season, expressing frustration with where they are while also not ruling out the possibility of a return.

title: Fans give KG big welcome in his return to Wolves
content: Timberwolves franchise icon Kevin Garnett made a special appearance for fan appreciation night in the team's regular-season finale Sunday, receiving a roar from the crowd and patting his heart with his hand after player introductions.

title: Report: Ex-Canes DE Bain drove in fatal car crash
content: Former Miami defensive end and 2026 NFL draft prospect Rueben Bain Jr. was involved in an auto accident in 2024 in which a passenger later died because of injuries sustained in the crash, according to a report published on Sunday.

title: Yelich exits hurt as Brewers expecting 'bad news'
content: Christian Yelich left the Milwaukee Brewers' game against the Washington Nationals on Sunday with tightness in his left hamstring.

title: Ovi lauds Penguins but waves off farewell shakes
content: After Washington's 3-0 loss to Pittsburgh on Sunday, Capitals star Alex Ovechkin, considering retirement after the season, waved off potential farewell handshakes with Sidney Crosby and the rest of the Penguins, who lingered after the win to salute him.

title: 🏈 NFL draft: Seven prospects climbing boards
content: Dillon Thieneman and Monroe Freeling have drastically boosted their stock since the start of last season. Who else has climbed the board?

title: NBA 2026 postseason preview: Matchups, biggest questions and what to know
content: Everything you need to know for the Thunder, Pistons, Spurs, Celtics and 16 other teams chasing the 2026 NBA title.

content: Strongest arm? Fastest offensive and defensive playmakers? Quickest first step? Let's hand out superlatives for this NFL draft class.

title: College coaches pick 2026 NFL draft sleepers
content: We know the top talent in the draft, but who could surprise in the pros? We asked their college coaches.

title: UCLA and its six seniors are eyeing a WNBA draft takeover
content: Can UCLA make history and have all six seniors -- who scored all of the team's points at the Final Four -- drafted in the WNBA?

title: WNBA draft preview: The case for every potential No. 1 pick
content: Will Lauren Betts, Awa Fam, Azzi Fudd or Olivia Miles go No. 1, and which transfers boosted their draft stock?

title: Eagles, A.J. Brown intrigue increases as NFL draft nears
content: The Eagles haven't been highly incentivized to move Brown to this point, in large part due to the financials.

title: Final 2026 NHL Awards Watch: Kucherov takes the lead for MVP
content: Our panel of PHWA voters identify their finalists for all the awards, with some tight finishes in a few spots.

title: A $1.07 billion series!? Why Mets-Dodgers is most expensive matchup in MLB history
content: When New York and L.A. collide this week, big-money baseball will be on display at a never-seen-before level.

title: NBA coaching carousel: What's next for Milwaukee and every open job?
content: Milwaukee and New Orleans are looking for long-term coaching fits. Here's what lies ahead for each franchise.

title: WNBA free agency and trade tracker: Plum back to Sparks, McBride back to Lynx
content: WNBA free agency is here. Kelsey Plum is returning to Los Angeles. Kayla McBride is returning to Minnesota.

title: NHL playoff watch: What's at stake in each of Monday's 10 matchups
content: There isn't much season left to determine playoff seeding and draft lottery order. Here's a rundown of what's on tap.

title: Klopp, Luis Enrique are the only managers to fix Real Madrid, and why that's a problem
content: Finding a new manager who is capable of measuring up to Real Madrid's unique demands this summer will be tougher than ever before.

title: MLB Bat Flip Championship Belt: Who's the first winner of 2026?
content: We're going to name a bat flip champion for 2026. Here's who holds the championship belt after the first battle of the season.

title: Gibbs family revels in Ty's first Cup Series victory
content: Ty Gibbs, 23, the grandson of Hall of Fame team owner Joe Gibbs, outdueled Ryan Blaney and Kyle Larson in overtime on Sunday at Bristol Motor Speedway in Tennessee, breaking through for his first NASCAR Cup Series victory in his 131st start.

title: From Cyndi Lauper to 'The Man': The evolution of women's wrestling at WrestleMania
content: Dive into how women's professional wrestling has evolved on WWE's biggest stage over the past 40 years.

title: King's gambit: Why NBA players are turning to chess
content: NBA players are spending more time than ever working on the boards -- but we're not talking rebounds.

title: Rankings: Top 100 players for 2026
content: Plan for the 2026 Fantasy Women's Basketball season with the top 100 rankings, including player position ranks.

title: Fury, Joshua and Wilder are back, what's next for the glamour division?
content: Tyson Fury won and called out Anthony Joshua, and with Deontay Wilder back, the heavyweight division is buzzing.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Nine Premier League clubs eye Leicester wonderkid
content: Around half the teams in the Premier League want to sign Leicester City winger Jeremy Monga. Transfer Talk has the latest.

content: At TOI World Desk, our dedicated team of seasoned journalists and passionate writers tirelessly sifts through the vast tapestry of global events to bring you the latest news and diverse perspectives round the clock. title: To be on electoral roll, to vote is a sentimental right, says Supreme Court
content: The act of voting is the biggest expression of nationality and patriotism, the EC departed from promise to leave voters in 2002 electoral roll untouched and the logical discrepancy category was unique to West Bengal, says apex court

title: Supreme Court refers Teesta Setalvad's plea for release of passport to 3-judge bench
content: On July 5, 2023, the top court had extended Ms. Setalvad’s interim protection from arrest in the case till July 19, 2023, while issuing a notice to the State on her appeal against the July 1, 2023, order of the high court

title: Assembly Elections 2026 LIVE: 19 States, Centre have come together to counter me; I am fighting alone for common people, says Mamata
content: Addressing a rally at Suri in Birbhum district, the Trinamool Congress supremo and Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee said the BJP won't be able to win the West Bengal elections using forces from Delhi

title: Nirmala Sitharaman, Stalin feud online over Centre’s letter on paddy incentive
content: The two leaders were at loggerheads over a January 9 communication of the Union Finance Ministry, regarding paddy incentive, which was sent to the Chief Secretaries of all States

title: Noida Link Road from Chilla Border blocked due to workers protests: Delhi Traffic Police
content: "Traffic at Noida severely affected due to ongoing agitation by the workers from private factories. They have completely blocked the Noida Link Road coming from Chilla Border (Delhi),” Delhi Traffic Police posted on X

title: Stalin’s remarks on paddy incentive ‘baseless, politically motivated’: Nirmala Sitharaman
content: Mr. Stalin, during an Assembly election campaign in Thanjavur on Friday (April 10), contended that the Centre had advised the Tamil Nadu government to discontinue providing incentives for paddy procured from farmers, claiming it was leading to excessive production

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Congress, CPI(M) question delay in poll data publication
content: Leader of the Opposition V.D. Satheesan writes to Chief Election Commissioner of India, drawing his attention to the fact that there is inordinate delay in publishing the official data related to the Kerala Assembly Elections

title: Asha Bhosle’s final journey draws huge crowds in Mumbai | Updates
content: A stream of political leaders, film personalities and admirers gathered in Mumbai to pay their last respects to the legendary playback singer

title: Rupee weakens by 56 paise to settle at 93.39 against U.S. dollar
content: According to forex analysts, uncertainties over the opening of Strait of Hormuz following the U.S. announcement to blockade Iranian ports further intensified withdrawal for foreign capital from domestic equities, weakening the Indian currency.

title: Poll-bound Tamil Nadu among top performers in many indicators | Data
content: The State’s performance exceeds the national average across various social and education-related indicators; however, it is a mixed bag in other indicators

title: Judges, doctors, and bureaucrats discuss suicide prevention methodologies in Chennai
content: Institute of Applied Therapeutics had organised the closed-door roundtable in Chennai to enable a candid exchange of thoughts

title: Noida protests: Uttar Pradesh Police chief says 'provocative elements' being identified, warns of strict action
content: The Uttar Pradesh Director General of Police said ‘provocative elements’ and ‘external elements’ involved in the unrest are being traced

title: TCS Nashik case: IT employees’ body approaches Labour Ministry, seeks POSH compliance audit in tech firm
content: NITES urged the Ministry to take “immediate and decisive action” by directing a comprehensive and time-bound audit and inspection

title: Nashik godman Ashok Kharat case: What we know so far
content: Several political leaders and social activists have accused Ashok Kharat of having alleged connections with prominent politicians and bureaucrats in the State

title: ED raids in money laundering case against Ashok Kharat
content: Five premises in Kharat's hometown, Nashik, and three each in Pune and Shirdi have been raided. Residential and commercial premises linked to Kharat, his chartered accountant (CA) Prakash Pophale, Kharat's relatives, and some branches of cooperative credit societies are being covered, says officials

title: CM Naidu asks Centre to cut regulations to under 100, simplify approvals for industries
content: Naidu directs officials to cut industrial regulations from over 800 to fewer than 100; permissions and licences for setting up industries should be in single digits, he said

title: Congress stands with Pawan Khera, we will not be intimidated: Rahul
content: Assam government has moved the Supreme Court challenging the transit anticipatory bail to Pawan Khera

title: Karnataka’s financial health is stronger than that of Central Government: CM Siddaramaiah
content: The Chief Minister said that when Narendra Modi assumed office as Prime Minister in 2014, the country’s total outstanding loans stood at ₹53.11 lakh crore. In the last 12 years, the figure has surged by ₹165.6 lakh crore

title: Akhilesh blames BJP policies for Noida violence over wage protest; Congress seeks solution over repression
content: The Opposition reactions came amid unrest in Noida where protests by factory workers demanding a salary hike turned violent in several areas

title: Kannur dental college student death raises questions about casteism on campuses
content: Parents alleged that certain faculty members discriminated against Nithin Raj on caste lines and showed a skin tone bias; CPI(M), Congress, and student organisations cutting across political lines have condemned the incident and demanded a comprehensive enquiry

title: Rajasthan Assembly, high court, sessions court receive bomb threats; nothing suspicious found
content: Authorities rushed to the locations, evacuated the premises and launched extensive searches with the help of bomb disposal and dog squad teams

title: Women’s Reservation Act will realise visions of past and fulfil resolutions of future: PM Modi
content: The Prime Minister said the Opposition, in particular, strongly emphasised the need to ensure the bill is implemented by 2029

title: Women's reservation law amendment should not be used as political tool: Shashi Tharoor
content: Tharoor also asserted that Congress is committed to a one-third reservation for women, but the same should be inclusive and fair

title: Private bus overturns in Shikaripur, 10 injured
content: Shivamogga MP B.Y. Raghavendra visited McGann Hospital and enquired about the health condition of the injured persons

title: Two probationary RTO inspectors caught taking bribe by Lokayukta Police in Bengaluru
content: The accused have been identified as Kiran S.P. (37) and Dinesh Kumar D.K. (48), both probationary IMV Inspectors posted at Nelamangala RTO, along with a private individual, Ramesh (40), a lorry driver from Nelamangala taluk

title: Supreme Court seeks government response on plea to pay farmers weighted average cost of production of crops
content: The MSP being fixed by the government year after year and crop by crop is considerably less than the weighted average cost of production, the petition says, with the newly concluded trade deal between India and the U.S. adding to the already acute distress

title: Nitish Kumar likely to resign on April 14, new government a day later
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Home Minister Amit Shah are likely to attend swearing-in ceremony of new Bihar Chief Minister on April 15

title: What is the SIR controversy in West Bengal | Explained
content: How many names have been deleted from the electoral rolls, and why? What are the logical discrepancies identified by the ECI? Why were large numbers of voters placed under adjudication, and how was this resolved? How has the SIR process reshaped the State’s political contest?

title: Waddar community: A quiet shift is in progress in Hubballi
content: For generations, stone carving defined the identity and livelihood of the Waddar community living beside the road leading to Hosur Circle

title: Andhra Pradesh Fire Services to observe Fire Safety Week from April 14 to 20
content: Andhra Pradesh State Disaster Response and Fire Services Department to hold awareness programmes, mock drills and training during Fire Safety Week from April 14 to 20

title: Tirupati road safety drive: 40 private buses booked, sleeper bus seized; ₹6 lakh fine imposed
content: Police, fire and transport officials book 40 private buses for safety violations in Tirupati; sleeper bus from Chhattisgarh seized for violating AIS-119 norms

title: Puducherry Assembly election 2026: High enthusiasm, long queues mark polling as the Union Territory shatters record
content: There were no major complaints pertaining to polling process; however, there were allegations of voter inducement and reports of minor scuffles from two constituencies during the early hours of polling.

title: A debate on the tenure of Election Commission-appointed police chief in Tamil Nadu
content: However, the EC order did not specify a tenure for him. The question is whether Mr. Rathore would be entitled to a minimum two-year tenure, as mandated by the Supreme Court in the  landmark Prakash Singh case. However, this ruling applies only to appointments made through the UPSC-led process

title: Congress issues whip, ask all Lok Sabha MPs to be present for special sitting of Parliament
content: The Budget session of Parliament has been extended with a special three-day sitting from April 16 to 18 to discuss amendments to the Women Reservation Act, set for implementation in 2029

title: Election Commission appoints Odisha-cadre IPS Officer as police observer for West Bengal polls
content: M. Sarvana Vivek, a 2015-batch IPS officer of the Odisha cadre, will oversee police-related arrangements during the two-phase polls, said the Election Commission

title: Iranian crude returns to India after seven years as tankers dock at key ports
content: The one-month exemption permitted the sale of Iranian oil already in transit, aimed at easing global supply disruptions and containing prices

title: Centre has advised T.N. to halt incentive for paddy: Stalin
content: Stalin promises that the procurement price of paddy will be increased to ₹3,500 a quintal under the Dravidian Model 2.0 government. He flays the Centre for raising the price of commercial gas cylinders

title: Traffic police book 979 cases in week-long crackdown on drunk driving, speeding in Bengaluru
content: Officials said the initiative is part of ongoing efforts to curb dangerous driving practices and enhance road safety in Bengaluru

title: Puducherry MP urges Centre to secure release of 12 Tamil fishermen detained by Sri Lankan Navy
content: In a letter to the Union Minister for External Affairs S. Jaishankar, the MP said the Sri Lankan Navy had taken into custody 12 fishermen while they were fishing near Kodiyakarai on April 11, 2026

title: Handur-N.R. Pura bridge in Chikkamagaluru inaugurated by Karnataka CM
content: Before the bridge was built, residents of Handur had to take a circuitous route to reach the taluk headquarters at N R Pura

title: Assam moves Supreme Court against Telangana HC relief to Congress leader Pawan Khera
content: The Assam Police had challenged the jurisdiction of the High Court to entertain the petition, saying the case was registered against Pawan Khera in Assam and not in Telangana

title: If Centre stops assistance or grants, we will not accept it: AIADMK leader-candidate K.P. Munusamy
content: It’s true that we backed the farm laws that had benefits for farmers, but it was Edappadi K. Palaniswami who stalled the project for the extraction of mineral resources in the delta, says the AIADMK deputy general secretary

title: Asha Parekh, A.R. Rahman, Sachin Tendulkar pay homage to Asha Bhosle
content: Mr. Tendulkar arrived soon after with his wife Anjali. Incidentally, Bhosle made one of her last appearances at the wedding of Tendulkar's son Arjun last month

title: Those hit by SIR deletions may see their other rights diluted: Prashant Bhushan
content: Yogendra Yadav warned that the removal of the names of lakhs of voters through the SIR exercise may extend beyond electoral disenfranchisement and impact other identity-linked rights

title: Are banks open or closed on April 14? Check state-wise holiday list
content: The TOI Business Desk is a vigilant and dedicated team of journalists committed to delivering the latest and most relevant business news from around the world to readers of The Times of India. title: Women's transfer rankings for 2026-27 season
content: the women's college basketball transfer portal opened Monday with a tidal wave of activity . more than 1,300 players are looking for new homes . the portal closes April 20 but players' decisions for their next school can still come after that .

title: Fight grades: Say A to one of the best UFC cards of the year
content: the fight card was filled with drama, comebacks, a retirement and an unlikely frontrunner for fight of the year . it was one lousy fight on the card ( Dominick Reyes vs. Johnny Walker ). it will be largely forgotten thanks to Carlos Ulberg's knock out of Ji Procházka .

title: Roman Reigns' Top 10 WrestleMania main events: Which match finished No. 1?
content: Roman Reigns will challenge CM Punk at WrestleMania 42 Night 2 on April 18 at Allegiant Stadium in Las Vegas for the world heavyweight championship in his 11th main event . he defeated Brock Lesnar at the "Winner Take All" main event between lesnar and thera .

title: Man City's win over Chelsea will have Arsenal sweating
content: man city beat man city 3-0 at the end of their 3-0 win over Chelsea . a win would move them to within three points of the gunners . city will move nine points clear at the top and banish the jitters .

title: Men's transfer rankings: The top 60 players in the portal right now
content: more than 1,000 men's basketball players added their names to the transfer portal . the portal drew around 2,100 players in 2024 and nearly 2,700 players last year . most coaches expect this season's portal entrants to surpass the 3,000 mark .

title: News: George Springer fractures toe; O's Adley Rutschman to IL
content: fantasy baseball buzz file aims to provide fantasy managers with the intel they need as news breaks around MLB . the final game of the fantasy week features the Atlanta Braves hosting the Cleveland Guardians at 7:20 p.m. ET . Jeremy Pena was lifted from the contest with a sore right knee .

title: Who should challenge for Carlos Ulberg's championship first?
content: Carlos Ulberg knocked out former champion Ji Procházka in the first round at uFC 327 to claim the title in his 10th consecutive victory . the only problem is that he also appeared to have suffered a leg injury that could put his immediate title defense in jeopardy . here are some possible scenarios for Ulberg and athletes who earned statement wins in Miami .

title: The case for the Ted Lindsay Award as the NHL's MVP trophy of record
content: Connor McDavid scored a hat trick in a win over San Jose . the Hart Trophy shouldn't be the MVP trophy of record in the NHL . he wants the Lindsay to be considered the top MVP award .

title: WNBA trade grades: Grading Sky's latest move, Rickea Jackson's fit
content: it has been a busy week of WNBA free agency . it started off when Angel Reese was traded to the Atlanta Dream . the sky finished tied for last in the league at 10-34 . veteran guard Ariel Atkins is headed back to LA .

title: 2026 NBA playoffs: Schedule, scores, news and highlights
content: the 2026 playoffs are set to begin on saturday . the playoff bracket isn't set yet . eight teams from each conference reach the first round and face off in a best-of-seven series to advance .

title: Punjab To Add Over 1,260 Buses To State Fleet Under Kilometre Scheme: Minister
content: The minister said, "PRTC is currently going through an active tender process to procure an additional 309 standard buses alongside 100 Midi buses, ensuring a comprehensive upgrade to the regional transport infrastructure.

title: Delhi Court's "Hope You Don't Return" Comment To Arvind Kejriwal
content: Kejriwal and the others discharged in the liquor policy case have sought the recusal of Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma from hearing a petition by the Central Bureau of Investigation against the trial court's decision. The court has accepted Kejriwal's application.

title: BJP's Tamilisai Soundararajan Seeks Heritage Revival In High-Stakes Mylapore Battle

title: "Time To End Decades Of Waiting": PM Modi On Women's Quota Law
content: The Prime Minister has written to all floor leaders, informing them of a special session on the 16th, 17th, and 18th April for the implementation of Women's Reservation Bill.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Why World's Most Powerful Man Has Failed To Stop Netanyahu From Razing Lebanon
content: Without US support, it is hard for Israel to fight any war. Netanyahu knows that. Can he revive his fortunes as his own countrymen and Trump get weary of his adventures?

title: Even If Hormuz Reopens Today, Oil, LNG Shipping May Take Months To Recover
content: According to experts, even if the Strait of Hormuz opens today, it would still likely take until July for oil flows to get back to normal.
